meaning: vt.俯瞰,耸出,远眺,没注意到n.眺望,俯瞰中的景色
examples: Houses which overlook the lake cost more.
I pulled off the road at a scenic overlook.
Pretty and comfortable rooms overlook a flower-filled garden.
These are attributes that enthusiastic entrepreneurs would rather overlook, as they fund their newest venture.
Investors might overlook this if the company were otherwise sound and on a growth trajectory.
